overall.description: First-person exploration of a high-end cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit hallways, a bedroom with holographic displays, a bathroom with vertical gardens, and a living area overlooking Night City. The footage showcases the game's detailed interior environments with dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry hallway with red neon accent lighting

events.description: approaching and opening the door to the bedroom

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow hallway illuminated by red neon strip lights toward the bedroom door

entered.detail: continuous red LED strip running along the ceiling and wall corner
illuminated wall poster with pink graphics and text CHIPPIN' IN
dark doorway with metallic frame leading to the bedroom

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, dark hallway illuminated by red neon strip lighting. A prominent CHIPPIN' IN poster glows on the right wall as the camera approaches the bedroom doorway at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern bedroom with holographic wall displays

events.description: turning toward the bathroom door on the far side of the room

agents.ego_description: entering the bedroom and moving across the space toward the bathroom entrance

entered.detail: low-profile modern bed with white bedding and integrated floor lighting
cyan-blue holographic screens showing various images mounted above the bed
open doorway leading to the bathroom area

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit bedroom featuring a large platform bed with white bedding and glowing cyan holographic displays on the wall. The space is quiet and empty as the camera moves across the carpeted floor toward the bathroom doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bathroom with vertical living wall and high-tech fixtures

events.description: entering the bathroom from the bedroom
panning left to examine the vertical garden and shower area

agents.ego_description: exploring the bathroom, examining the double sinks, vertical garden wall, and shower enclosure

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling living wall with climbing plants on a lattice structure
dark stone countertop with two circular sinks and illuminated smart controls
glass-walled shower with marble flooring and rainfall showerhead
illuminated wall poster with red graphics and text SAMURAI near the toilet
modern white toilet with integrated bidet and control panel

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a sophisticated bathroom featuring a lush vertical garden wall with climbing plants, a double vanity with high-tech displays, and a glass shower enclosure. The space is warmly lit with accent lighting highlighting the greenery and fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room office with neon lighting and city view

events.description: exiting bathroom and returning through bedroom to the main living area
entering area with prominent red neon ceiling lighting and city view

agents.ego_description: moving from the bathroom back through the bedroom into the living area, approaching the desk and window

entered.detail: continuous red LED strips running along the ceiling edges and walls
large dark desk with computer terminal, keyboard, and scattered items
large panoramic window overlooking Night City with distant neon lights
illuminated wall-mounted display case featuring samurai imagery

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the bathroom and moves back through the bedroom into a spacious living area dominated by red neon ceiling lighting. The space features an office desk with a computer setup and a large window revealing the nighttime cityscape of Night City outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a high-end cyberpunk apartment, transitioning from a moody, narrow corridor into a series of sophisticated living spaces. It begins by moving through a dark hallway illuminated by red neon strips and a glowing poster before passing through a doorway into a dimly lit bedroom. As the camera glides across the carpeted floor past cyan holographic displays, the scene shifts into a warmly lit bathroom characterized by a lush vertical garden wall and high-tech vanity fixtures. The camera then retreats from the greenery, moving back through the bedroom to open into a spacious living area dominated by red ceiling lights. Finally, the perspective settles near a computer desk, revealing a vast window that looks out over the shimmering nighttime cityscape of Night City.
